pageContext.name: Captain America (Sam Wilson) Mini Co.
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the Captain America (Sam Wilson) Mini Co. Collectible Figure from the Mini Co. Series line.  These hand-painted Captain America collectible figures were created by Iron Studios and are the perfect size for any desk or shelf no matter the size of your collection.  A must-have for fans of Marvel collectibles!
